reachability_artifacts: sworn memory build output in proof.md

violations: Gate 2 — start_commit is 16c0a8b (coach-ack commit) not d441b4c (start-implementation commit). git diff --name-only 16c0a8b includes cmd/sworn/main.go, cmd/sworn/telemetry.go, internal/telemetry/telemetry.go, internal/telemetry/telemetry_test.go, internal/git/git.go, internal/git/git_test.go — none in spec planned touchpoints. proof.md Divergence from plan says None without acknowledging these files. Fix: set start_commit to d441b4c.

design_decisions.rationale: Regex extraction of links is sufficient for known format, avoiding full Markdown parser overhead.
Split by --- separators to support multi-entry flat files, using fragment in path for SHA256 disambiguation.
Preserve input ordering when splitting batches to ensure correct mapping of texts to embeddings.
Single connection per build operation is sufficient for <500-entry corpora without pooling or WAL.

design_decisions.decision: API key reading at call time
design_decisions.rationale: Read key from env during Embed() to allow setting it mid-session and fail at embed time if missing.
